name: AndroidModLoader
snippet: AML is a mod loader for almost ANY android game or application ! AML has been started as a GTA-series mod loader AND as a Gorilla Tag mod loader.

name: AndroidModLoader/SAUtils: Mod-library for GTASA mods
snippet: Mod-library for GTASA mods. Contribute to AndroidModLoader/SAUtils development by creating an account on GitHub.

name: AndroidModLoader/AMLLA: Android Mod Loader's Limit
snippet: AMLLA is Android ModLoader's Limit Adjuster . A limit adjuster for Android games that may get support from that mod! AMLLA is available for: GTA:SA ...

name: thelink2012/modloader: Mod Loader for GTA III
snippet: Mod Loader is a plugin for Grand Theft Auto III, Vice City and San Andreas that adds an easy and user-friendly way to install and uninstall modifications ...

name: Releases · thelink2012/modloader
snippet: Mod Loader for GTA III, Vice City and San Andreas . Contribute to thelink2012/modloader development by creating an account on GitHub.

name: GitHub - AndroidModLoader/GTASA_Male01Fix: A fix for
snippet: This is a port of a mod that tries to fix the appearance of Male01 (the model that is used when it's failed to load any other ped model).

name: AndroidModLoader/GTA_CLEOMod
snippet: This is a CLEO wrapped in an AML mod ! Original author of a CLEO on Android is Alexander Blade (http://www.dev-c.com/).

name: Releases · AndroidModLoader/SAUtils
snippet: May 22, 2023 — Mod-library for GTASA mods. Contribute to AndroidModLoader/SAUtils development by creating an account on GitHub.

name: AndroidModLoader/SAShaderL: A custom shader loader
snippet: A custom shader loader for GTA:SA Android . Contribute to AndroidModLoader/SAShaderL development by creating an account on GitHub.
